---
title: "inbreeding"
author: "Andrea Estandia"
date: "31/03/2026"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup}
# Knitr settings: 
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file())
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, eval = FALSE)
options(scipen = 999)
```

```{r}
source("./src/wm-europe_source.R")
```

```{r}
hom_file <- file.path(reports_path, "roh", "wm_europe_biallelic_filtered_all.hom")
hom_indiv_file <- file.path(reports_path, "roh", "wm_europe_biallelic_filtered_all.hom.indiv")
hom_summary_file <- file.path(reports_path, "roh", "wm_europe_biallelic_filtered_all.hom.summary")
irem_file <- file.path(reports_path, "roh", "wm_europe_biallelic_filtered_all.irem")
ibc_file <- file.path(reports_path, "roh", "wm_europe_ibc_all.ibc")
metadata_file <- file.path(data_path, "dfs_processed", "wgs_europe_metadata.csv")

# ---- helpers ----
clean_names_dt <- function(dt) {
  setnames(dt, names(dt), tolower(names(dt)))
  dt
}

base_theme <- theme_classic(base_size = 14, base_family = "roboto_condensed") +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14)
  )

# ---- read data ----
# .hom is very large; only read if you need per-segment analyses.
# hom <- clean_names_dt(fread(hom_file))
hom_indiv <- clean_names_dt(fread(hom_indiv_file))
ibc <- clean_names_dt(fread(ibc_file))

# Read only the columns needed for the hotspot plot to keep memory low
hom_summary <- clean_names_dt(
  fread(hom_summary_file, select = c("CHR", "BP", "AFF", "UNAFF"))
)

# Optional metadata join
metadata <- NULL
if (file.exists(metadata_file)) {
  metadata <- read.csv(metadata_file, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  names(metadata) <- tolower(names(metadata))
}

if (!is.null(metadata) && "iid" %in% names(metadata)) {
  hom_indiv <- hom_indiv %>% left_join(metadata, by = "iid")
  ibc <- ibc %>% left_join(metadata, by = "iid")
}

# ---- quick summaries ----
roh_indiv_summary <- hom_indiv %>%
  summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    total_roh_kb = sum(kb, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_roh_kb = median(kb, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_roh_kb = mean(kb, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_nseg = median(nseg, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_nseg = mean(nseg, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_kbavg = median(kbavg, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_kbavg = mean(kbavg, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
print(roh_indiv_summary)

write.csv(hom_indiv, file.path(figures_path, "hom_indiv_with_metadata.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(ibc, file.path(figures_path, "ibc_with_metadata.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(roh_indiv_summary, file.path(figures_path, "roh_individual_summary_stats.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

```


```{r}
palette <- c(
  Spain = "#e76f51",
  UK = "#34a0a4",
  Norway = "#ffb703",
  Shetland = "#6a994e"
)

remove_ind <- c(
  "CHA_M66", "MCH_F7", "BNS05", "CHS012", "CMB028", "CMN08",
  "DUM2", "GUL1", "GUL3", "GUL9", "OSL1", "OSL12", "ROS18", "SP4", "SP5"
)

ibc_dir <- dirname(ibc_file)

ibc_files <- list(
  Spain = file.path(ibc_dir, "wm_europe_ibc_spain.ibc"),
  UK = file.path(ibc_dir, "wm_europe_ibc_uk.ibc"),
  Norway = file.path(ibc_dir, "wm_europe_ibc_norway.ibc"),
  Shetland = file.path(ibc_dir, "wm_europe_ibc_shetland.ibc")
)

# Read data
ibc_list <- lapply(ibc_files, function(f) {
  clean_names_dt(fread(f)) %>%
    rename(sample_name = iid) %>%
    filter(!sample_name %in% remove_ind) %>%
    left_join(metadata, by = "sample_name")
})

# Shared y limits
ylims <- range(unlist(lapply(ibc_list, \(x) x$fhat2)), na.rm = TRUE)
ypad <- diff(ylims) * 0.05
ylims <- c(ylims[1] - ypad, ylims[2] + ypad)

# Shared theme
base_theme <- theme_classic() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    text = element_text(family = "roboto_condensed", size = 16),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

make_ibc_plot <- function(df, title) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      x_id = row_number(),
      country = title   # 👈 assign country label
    ) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = x_id, y = fhat2, color = country)) +
    geom_point(size = 1.8) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = ylims) +
    scale_color_manual(values = palette) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "F", title = title) +
    base_theme +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "none"   # 👈 cleaner since each panel is one group
    )
}

# Individual panels
p_spain    <- make_ibc_plot(ibc_list[["Spain"]], "Spain")
p_uk       <- make_ibc_plot(ibc_list[["UK"]], "UK")
p_norway   <- make_ibc_plot(ibc_list[["Norway"]], "Norway")
p_shetland <- make_ibc_plot(ibc_list[["Shetland"]], "Shetland")

# Combine
ibc_plot <- (p_spain + p_uk) /
            (p_norway + p_shetland) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "a")

# Save
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(figures_path, "ibc_by_subset.png"),
  plot = ibc_plot,
  width = 10,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

ibc_plot
```
